headline: As part of her Citi turnaround, Jane Fraser cut management layers from 13 to 8. But the ‘great flattening’ doesn’t always work as intended
summary: From Meta's 50-to-1 reporting ratios to Coinbase's latest layoffs, CEOs are racing to flatten their org charts. The results aren't always what they expect.

headline: Is Wells Fargo Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Wells Fargo has underperformed the Dow over the past year, yet Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook on the stock’s prospects.
